name: workspace-memory-live-phase2
description: Live phase-2 workspace memory evaluation set covering longer interaction sessions, denser multi-entity batches, deeper trees, and live Gmail integration fetch.

scenarios.description: Six long Pine Harbor turns should form one clean customer tree across two batches.
writer_turns: Pine Harbor billing escalation contact is Mila Hart. If the finance queue stalls for more than fifteen minutes, route the case to her before opening an external escalation.
Pine Harbor billing dispute escalation procedure is: 1. Open the ledger case. 2. Confirm the dispute packet and Stripe evidence. 3. Escalate to the billing lead with the packet attached.
Pine Harbor contract renewal owner is Denver Lane. He wants renewal risks surfaced at least two weeks before the commercial review.
Pine Harbor refund hold window is 48 hours before escalation, and the hold timer starts only after the dispute packet is complete.
Pine Harbor settlement dashboard URL is https://dash.example.internal/pine-harbor/settlement and the dashboard owner is still the finance analytics team.
Pine Harbor urgent finance bridge channel is #pine-harbor-finance-war-room. Use that bridge only for payment-blocking incidents, not for routine invoice questions.

reader_queries.query: Who is the Pine Harbor billing escalation contact?
What is the Pine Harbor billing dispute escalation procedure?
How long is the Pine Harbor refund hold window?

scenarios.description: Nine verbose Silver Oak turns should force a deeper single-entity tree instead of a flat leaf bucket.
writer_turns: Silver Oak billing escalation contact is Amina Rhodes. She owns anything related to disputed wire settlements and overdue credit memos.
Silver Oak refund hold policy requires a 36 hour cooling period before manual release, and the hold timer resets if finance asks for new evidence.
Silver Oak renewal forecast owner is Ellis Wu. He wants renewal-risk summaries bundled with open credit issues.
Silver Oak settlement dashboard lives at https://ops.internal/silver-oak/settlement, and the dashboard is considered the source of truth during payout reviews.
Silver Oak invoice correction runbook is: 1. Re-open the ledger case. 2. Attach the corrected invoice PDF. 3. Ping the finance lead in #silver-oak-ops.
Silver Oak urgent bridge channel is #silver-oak-ops. Use the bridge when payouts are blocked or a refund timer is about to expire.
Silver Oak payment review meeting is every Tuesday at 4pm Eastern, and the finance lead expects unresolved disputes called out first.
Silver Oak contract legal reviewer is Tara Singh, especially for clauses that mention settlement reserves or chargeback exposure.
Silver Oak exception approval threshold is $25,000. Requests above that amount require finance director approval before release.

reader_queries.query: How long is the Silver Oak refund hold before manual release?
When is the Silver Oak payment review meeting?
What is the Silver Oak invoice correction runbook?

scenarios.description: Three interleaved customers across three batches should stay separated without duplicate leaves.
writer_turns: Redwood Care account manager is Paul Reed. He expects payment-status escalations bundled with the current claim summary.
Juniper Supply escalation contact is Yara Chen. Use her for warehouse billing disputes that block same-day shipment release.
Delta Marine refund approvals go through Colin Pike, especially when parts returns are linked to warranty credits.
Redwood Care rebate exception procedure is: 1. Open the care-ops ledger note. 2. Attach the payer exception PDF. 3. Escalate in #redwood-care-revenue.
Juniper Supply urgent bridge channel is #juniper-supply-ops, and the operations lead expects shipment blockers called out before invoice blockers.
Delta Marine invoice aging dashboard is at https://ops.internal/delta-marine/aging and it is reviewed before Friday credit holds.
Redwood Care payment review meeting is every Thursday at 3pm Pacific. The review starts with open payer disputes.
Juniper Supply account manager is Omar Vale, and he wants unresolved shortage claims surfaced with the billing packet.
Delta Marine warranty credit reviewer is Nora Hale. She signs off on credits above the routine marine-parts allowance.

reader_queries.query: Who is the Redwood Care account manager?
What is the Juniper Supply urgent bridge channel?
Who approves Delta Marine refund exceptions?

scenarios.description: A six-turn project session should preserve rollout knowledge as project memory instead of leaking it to AGENTS.
writer_turns: Beacon API rollout approver is Keira Tan. She is the final approver once the staging smoke tests and canary metrics are attached.
Beacon API canary rollback procedure is: 1. Disable the traffic shift. 2. Revert the release flag. 3. Page the platform on-call with the canary diff.
Beacon API staging endpoint is beacon-staging.internal and the release dashboard is Grafana board beacon-api-rollout-health.
Beacon API release captain is Noah Bell. He owns the release checklist and the incident bridge invite list.
Beacon API incident bridge channel is #beacon-api-rollout and the default bridge owner is still the platform release manager.
Beacon API post-release verification query is "payments.success_rate by region" and the metrics team expects it run within fifteen minutes of rollout.

reader_queries.query: Who approves Beacon API rollouts?
What is the Beacon API canary rollback procedure?
What is the Beacon API staging endpoint?

scenarios.description: A mixed project-and-customer session should keep ownership clean while still answering both kinds of recall questions.
writer_turns: Cedar Hollow billing escalation contact is Priya Shah. She wants all payment blockers bundled with the current dispute note.
Orbit Console release captain is Liam Park, and he owns the deploy checklist for the next customer-facing rollout.
Cedar Hollow refund hold procedure is: 1. Open the ledger case. 2. Confirm the Stripe dispute event. 3. Escalate to the finance lead.
Orbit Console rollback bridge is #orbit-console-rollout and the rollback approver is still Hannah Voss.
Cedar Hollow contract renewal owner is Helen Cho. Renewal exceptions should be paired with open credit issues.
Orbit Console staging endpoint is orbit-console-staging.internal and the SLO board is Grafana board orbit-console-health.

reader_queries.query: Who is the Cedar Hollow billing escalation contact?
Who is the Orbit Console release captain?
What is the Orbit Console staging endpoint?

scenarios.description: Two similarly named customers should remain separated under longer turns and overlapping finance vocabulary.
writer_turns: North Star Care escalation contact is Vera Kim. She handles payer disputes and refund timers for the healthcare line.
Northstar Logistics escalation contact is Owen Price. He handles freight-credit disputes and missed dock-appointment penalties.
North Star Care urgent bridge channel is #north-star-care-finance and it is used for payer escalations that threaten same-day release.
Northstar Logistics urgent bridge channel is #northstar-logistics-ops and it is used for missed dock-appointment disputes that block dispatch.
North Star Care payment review meeting is every Wednesday at 2pm Eastern with the care-finance lead.
Northstar Logistics payment review meeting is every Thursday at 11am Central with the freight operations manager.

reader_queries.query: Who is the North Star Care escalation contact?
What is the Northstar Logistics urgent bridge channel?

scenarios.description: A vendor-like customer name should still resolve to a customer tree under longer procedural turns.
writer_turns: Mercury Payments billing escalation contact is Sam Rivera. He owns partner settlement issues and any payout-release blockers tied to reconciliation.
Mercury Payments refund exception procedure is: 1. Confirm the ledger variance. 2. Reproduce the issue in staging. 3. Escalate to the on-call engineer with the variance screenshot.
Mercury Payments contract renewal owner is Lila Moreno, and she expects unresolved payout disputes surfaced before commercial review.
Mercury Payments war-room bridge channel is #mercury-payments-war-room for payout-blocking incidents only.
Mercury Payments settlement dashboard is https://ops.internal/mercury-payments/settlements and the finance team uses it before manual release.
Mercury Payments exception approval threshold is $15,000 before finance director sign-off is required.

reader_queries.query: Who is the Mercury Payments billing escalation contact?
What is the Mercury Payments refund exception procedure?

scenarios.description: Two release programs with overlapping terminology should stay as separate project trees.
writer_turns: RDX Console release captain is Maya Lin, and she owns the staged rollout checklist for the revenue dashboard launch.
Harbor Admin release captain is Theo Marsh, and he owns the permission-migration checklist for the admin rollout.
RDX Console rollback bridge channel is #rdx-console-rollout and the rollback approver is Dana Cole.
Harbor Admin rollback bridge channel is #harbor-admin-release and the rollback approver is Iris Kent.
RDX Console staging endpoint is rdx-console-staging.internal and the SLO board is Grafana board rdx-console-health.
Harbor Admin staging endpoint is harbor-admin-staging.internal and the SLO board is Grafana board harbor-admin-health.

reader_queries.query: Who is the RDX Console release captain?
What is the Harbor Admin rollback bridge channel?

scenarios.description: A dense Orchid Holdings customer session should preserve multiple operational facts without AGENTS leakage.
writer_turns: Orchid Holdings billing escalation contact is Sam Rivera. He expects a short dispute summary attached before any same-day escalation.
Orchid Holdings refund hold window is 12 hours after the finance variance is confirmed, and the clock pauses if support is waiting on payer evidence.
Orchid Holdings contract renewal owner is Priya Desai, and she wants payout-risk items escalated before the renewal draft is circulated.
Orchid Holdings operations bridge channel is #orchid-holdings-finance and it is used only for payout blockers or expiring refund timers.
Orchid Holdings exception approval threshold is $18,000 before the finance director must sign off.
Orchid Holdings invoice review dashboard is https://ops.internal/orchid-holdings/invoices and it is reviewed before every Tuesday payout run.

reader_queries.query: How long is the Orchid Holdings refund hold window?
What is the Orchid Holdings operations bridge channel?
